title: Eva 02 in EoE could Asuka have taken in an S2 Engine
display_title: Eva 02 in EoE could Asuka have taken in an S2 Engine
wikitext:
[]: Eva-02 in EoE - could Asuka have taken in an S2 Engine?             Quote Post by Leighton » Sat Nov 10, 2012 2:43 am Hi everyone, back after snatching a few scenes from EoE. During the final battle, could Asuka (and her mother) have gone berserk, thus breaking the mouth armour of Eva-02 allowing the consumption of the S2 engine of one or multiple of the EVA series? [That brings up another question, do the EVA series lose their regenerating ability if another EVA eats their S2 engines?] Now, would the battle actually be on equal grounds, or even in Asuka's hands (her fighting ability seems to be much greater than the Kaworu controlled EVA series), considering both sides have the regenerating ability? Or would the Lances of Longinus that were thrown at her still completely have nullified the ability/brought her demise?

[]:             Quote Post by bobbyfischer's ghost » Sat Nov 10, 2012 3:04 am Once the MP Eva's lose their S² they lose the ability to reactivate not regenerate. In the fight with the MP Eva's they were just playing around with Asuka, never seriously fighting her to begin with. It gave her a false sense of superiority which lead to her downfall.

[]: Re: Eva-02 in EoE - could Asuka have taken in an S2 Engine?             Quote Post by Mr. Tines » Sat Nov 10, 2012 3:22 am Leighton wrote: allowing the consumption of the S2 engine of one or multiple of the EVA series?

[]:             Quote Post by Der Kommissar » Sat Nov 10, 2012 1:53 pm Would it even have needed to? Evas with no power sources have been shown to operate without power while berserk before. 01 takes Zeruel apart when it shouldn't even be capable of moving. Hell, even 02 activates while powerless right before the MP units tear it to shreds, though it's too severely injured at that point for berserking to save it.

[]:             Quote Post by Sachi » Sat Nov 10, 2012 4:09 pm Der Kommissar wrote: Would it even have needed to? Evas with no power sources have been shown to operate without power while berserk before. 01 takes Zeruel apart when it shouldn't even be capable of moving. Hell, even 02 activates while powerless right before the MP units tear it to shreds, though it's too severely injured at that point for berserking to save it.

[]:             Quote Post by Hyper Shinchan » Sat Nov 10, 2012 4:15 pm Sachi wrote: That is among the reasons why Gendo was reluctant to deploy Unit 01 after the Zeruel incident.

[]:             Quote Post by Sachi » Sat Nov 10, 2012 4:35 pm Hyper Shinchan wrote: I had the impression that it was only, or at least mainly, because he didn't want to provoke Seele any further, especially after the unauthorised usage of the Spear.

[]:             Quote Post by Anubis » Sat Nov 10, 2012 10:44 pm Could she had won by taking out the Dummy-plugs?

[]:             Quote Post by Hyper Shinchan » Sat Nov 10, 2012 10:51 pm Anubis wrote: Could she had won by taking out the Dummy-plugs?

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Sat Nov 10, 2012 11:23 pm The dummy plugs are fixed, via cybernetic implant, within the spines and thoracic cavities of the MP Evas. I doubt they come out with the ease of a tampon. Eva-02 was on a pretty limited schedule, as well. Leighton wrote: During the final battle, could Asuka (and her mother) have gone berserk, thus breaking the mouth armour of Eva-02 allowing the consumption of the S2 engine of one or multiple of the EVA series?

[]:             Quote Post by Hyper Shinchan » Sun Nov 11, 2012 12:37 am Ara-ara, I understood "taking out" as plainly "destroying" rather than physically removing them, Rei destroyed them with a long range sniper rifle in Anima if I remember well, I guess that just as Reichu said dislodging them would be pretty difficult.

 am Ara-ara, I understood "taking out" as plainly "destroying" rather than physically removing them, Rei destroyed them with a long range sniper rifle in Anima if I remember well, I guess that just as Reichu said dislodging them would be pretty difficult.
